reviews.review_description:
When I saw the trailer for this on reddit, i was skeptical, it seemed too good to be true. But i decided to buy it anyway because from what i saw, it looked like my dream XR relaxation/meditation app.

After trying it for a while, i can safely say, it is!! In this app, you can fill your real life environment (mixed reality) with calming objects and sounds of your choosing (there is no limit to how many you can place, you are only limited by the headset's power), listen to a few included guided meditation sessions, and create your own ideal relaxing space. There's also a VR mode for when you want to be totally isolated instead.

For me, this beats both Guided Meditation VR and Tripp, the two big meditation apps out there. In both of those, you can only select a few premade environments and meditations. In here, you can for example place a Visual Meditation screen (which shows you text lines that fade to the next after a few seconds), place a Rain On Window sound near your actual window, put a few Sound Bowls next to you, turn some relaxing music on (btw most of the included songs are like 45-minute contineous songs. amazing compression work there considering right now this app takes up only 1.2gb of space), turn on Grass (fills your floor with virtual grass!), place a few  plants, add whatever else you want, and just.. relax.

This has ENORMOUS potential and i can see this becoming HUGE if the dev keeps working on and improving this project.

My new favorite relaxation app on quest, thanks for making this!!❤️

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed review and I am glad you are enjoying it! I hope to get it in the hands of more so I can continue adding more content!
